title: Roseanna
writer: Maj Sjöwall, Per Wahlöö, Hans Abramson
actors: Keve Hjelm, Hans Ernback, Tor Isedal
plot: A dead and unknown woman is found in a canal. Police inspector Martin Beck becomes involved in the case. After several months the woman is identified. The police reconstruct the woman's last trip on the canal boat "Wilhelm Tham".
